characters.appearance: Older Indian woman, late 50s, medium build, fair complexion. Black hair tied back.
characters.wardrobe: Light grey and white patterned salwar kameez with a floral dupatta.
characters.demeanor: Curious and initially questioning, later attentive.

characters.appearance: Young Indian woman, late 20s, medium build, fair complexion. Black hair.
characters.wardrobe: Pink top, black pants with white side stripes, and a solid pink dupatta draped over her head and shoulders.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: बहू मैंने देखा है तुम दिन भर इंग्लिश में किसी से बात करती रहती हो। कौन है वो? [Daughter-in-law, I have seen you talking to someone in English all day. Who is it?]
Character B says: अरे मम्मी जी, वो कोई और नहीं है, Supernova ऐप का AI ट्यूटर है। [Oh mother-in-law, it's no one else, it's the Supernova app's AI tutor.]
Character B says: मैं रोज़ उनके साथ इंग्लिश बोलने की प्रैक्टिस करती हूँ। [I practice speaking English with them every day.]
Character B says: मैं सोच रही हूँ मैं भी कोई जॉब कर लूँ, इसीलिए। [I am thinking of getting a job too, that's why.]
Character A says: क्यों? मेरे बेटे की कमाई से घर नहीं चल रहा क्या? [Why? Is my son's income not enough to run the house?]
Character B says: ऐसा नहीं है मम्मी। मैं पढ़ाई में बहुत तेज़ थी, लेकिन उसका कुछ कर नहीं पाई। [It's not like that, mother. I was very bright in studies, but couldn't do anything with it.]
Character B says: अब शादी और बच्चे तो हो गए, तो मैंने सोचा कि मैं घर पे क्या करूँगी। [Now that I am married and have kids, I thought what will I do at home.]
Character B says: अगर मैं भी कमाने लगी, तो उनको भी मदद मिलेगी। [If I also start earning, it will help him too.]
Character B says: और आजकल हर अच्छी जॉब के लिए इंग्लिश बोलना बहुत ज़रूरी है। [And nowadays, speaking English is very important for every good job.]
Character B says: इसीलिए Supernova ऐप पे प्रैक्टिस करती हूँ। [That's why I practice on the Supernova app.]
Character B says: इसके AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ बात करने से मेरा कॉन्फिडेंस बहुत बढ़ गया है। [Practicing daily with its AI tutor has really boosted my confidence.]
Character B says: अब मैं इंटरव्यूज़ के लिए भी तैयार हूँ। [Now I am ready for interviews too.]
Character B says: क्योंकि अब मैं बिना डरे, कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोल सकती हूँ। [Because now I can speak English with confidence, without fear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook establishes curiosity about the daughter-in-law speaking English.
- Introduces the relatable problem of wanting to work after marriage but feeling held back.
- Positions Supernova as the practical, confidence-building solution for real-world career goals, removing competitor hype about '2 weeks'.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना सीखें और अपना कॉन्फिडेंस बढ़ाएं (Learn to speak English with Supernova and boost your confidence). Dynamic Hinglish subtitles.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: अगर आप भी अपने करियर में आगे बढ़ना चाहते हैं, तो आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करें और अपनी इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस शुरू करें। [If you also want to move forward in your career, download the Supernova app today and start your English practice.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Direct address to the camera by the relatable protagonist.
- Encourages viewers to take action for their own career growth.
- Clear CTA to download Supernova.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करें (Download the Supernova app today). Dynamic Hinglish subtitles.
